routineText:
09:00 — Wake up & go to Work
09:00
      — (4h) Work & Water 1L
13:00
13:00 — Black coffee + 1 tsp of sugar

-----------------------
| 14:00 — 🌅 Breakfast
| — whole wheat bread 35g
| — 6 whites & 3 yolks of beldi eggs fried with 5g of olive oil
| — 5g of raw olive oil
| — mint tea + 1 tsp of sugar
| — cumin & salt
| — oat 55g + warm water
| — 1 scoop of protein powder with water
| — 1/2 small apple
| — 1/4 small peach
| — 1/2 small kiwi
| — 2 garlic cloves
| — 15g pumpkin seeds
-----------------------

14:00 — return to Work
14:00
      — (4h) Work & Water 1L
18:00
18:00 — Out from work

-----------------------
| 18:00 — ☀️ Lunch
| — kefta 90/10 250g raw cooked with 1 small onion
| — brown rice 25g raw (↓ from 70g)
| — 300g legume sauté with 5g of olive oil (carrot, courgette, onion)
| — cumin & salt
-----------------------

18:00 — Black Coffee
18:00
      — (4h) Rest or Billard & Water 1L
21:00
21:00 — Back Home

-----------------------
| 21:00 — 🌙 Dinner
| — 1 scoop of protein powder
| — 1 perly nature
| — 2g Almonds
| — 2g Walnuts
| — 2g Cashews
| — 2g Pistachios
| — 1 kiwi
-----------------------

01:00 — Sleep

adjustments.reason: Rest-day carb target is ~130g. Bread (breakfast) + oat 55g + rice 70g would land carbs at 124% (161g), on the edge of the warn zone. Trimming rice by 25g — the lowest-fiber-density carb source in the meal — brings carbs to 110% (right at the good-range ceiling) and calories to almost exactly 1,800, without touching protein or fat.
Protocol's anti-gas 'do' rule calls for cumin in every meal — gas/bloating is the #1 flagged issue. Mehdi confirmed cumin was added at lunch; dinner still has none.

The post-breakfast apple, peach, and kiwi pushed carbs to 123% (warn). A further rice trim (45g→25g) removes ~14.5g carbs, bringing carbs down to 112% — not quite back to 'good' but much closer — while calories land almost exactly on the 1,800 target.

verdict.text_html: Protein finally hits 100% — 1,889 kcal (105%, still close) — 15g pumpkin seeds closed the protein gap and added a real magnesium boost, at the cost of nudging carbs to 115%.

coverage.name: Calories
coverage.note: 89 kcal over — still within the good-calorie tolerance after adding pumpkin seeds

coverage.name: Protein
coverage.note: Pumpkin seeds' 4.5g pushed this from 97% to almost exactly 100%

coverage.name: Carbs
coverage.note: Pumpkin seeds add 1.6g carbs on top of the garlic/rice-trimmed total — still well under the 125% bad line

coverage.name: Fat
coverage.note: Pumpkin seeds' 7.4g fat pushed this from 94% to 105% — still comfortably inside the good range

coverage.name: Fiber
coverage.note: Pumpkin seeds add another 0.9g — best fiber coverage of the day so far, still short of target

coverage.name: Gas / bloat risk
coverage.note: Cumin was only at breakfast, now added to lunch too — dinner still has none; onion is cooked (not raw) in both dishes, which is fine per protocol

coverage.name: Protocol adherence
coverage.note: Bread once ✓, dinner well before 22:00 ✓ — cumin now covered at breakfast + lunch, dinner still missing it

coverage.name: Vitamin C
coverage.note: Apple + peach + kiwi at breakfast pushed this well past the dinner kiwi + vegetables alone

coverage.name: Calcium
coverage.note: No milk (protocol dont) and only one perly today — weakest spot of the day

good: Protein hits 100% of target for the first time this stretch — pumpkin seeds closed the last of the gap
Magnesium jumped from 56% to 66% — pumpkin seeds are the single best magnesium source logged so far
Vitamin C at 160% of target — apple, peach, and kiwi at breakfast on top of the dinner kiwi
Dinner finished by 21:00 — well within the 22:00 cutoff
bad: Carbs at 115% after pumpkin seeds' small carb contribution — still well under the 125% bad line
Fat back up to 105% (still good) after being at 94% — worth watching if more additions come later today
Cumin still missing from dinner — added back at lunch, but dinner (whey + perly + nuts + kiwi) has none
Calcium (16%), Iodine (13%), Chromium (14%) — structural gaps on a day with no dairy, fatty fish, or avocado
loggedItems: 6 egg whites + 3 egg yolks (beldi), fried with 5g olive oil
Kefta 90/10 250g raw, cooked with 1 small onion (~50g)
Brown rice 25g raw (↓ from 70g, further trimmed from 45g)
300g légumes sautés (carrot 100g, courgette 100g, onion 100g) with 5g olive oil

fullTable.note: Kefta 250g + 2 whey scoops + eggs + pumpkin seeds — lands almost exactly on target
3 × 1L blocks from the schedule
Oat, legumes, and the breakfast apple/peach/kiwi contribute, but the rice trim and no potato/banana keep this short
Beldi eggs' richer yolks + walnuts 2g — better than plain eggs but still low, no fatty fish
3 egg yolks only — structural gap without fatty fish
Kefta + oat + yolks + rice add up almost exactly to target
Kefta + eggs comfortably clear the target
15g pumpkin seeds add ~39mg — the single biggest magnesium boost of the day
No milk (protocol dont) — only one perly nature today, weakest spot of the day
Kefta dominant, pumpkin seeds add another ~1.1mg on top of eggs and oat
Kefta + vegetables + kiwi + perly + the breakfast fruit, but no potato/banana today
Oat, rice, vegetables, kiwi, yolks, and the breakfast fruit each contribute a little
Apple + peach + kiwi at breakfast on top of the dinner kiwi + vegetables push this well past target
Carrot + beldi egg yolks (richer in Vit A than standard eggs)
Structural gap — no dairy, seafood, or iodized salt today
3 olive oil portions + almonds, but no avocado today — lower than usual
Kiwi (breakfast + dinner) + carrot + courgette — no avocado today to help
Kefta + eggs + onion + kiwi push this well past target
Kefta + eggs comfortably cover this
Oat, rice, bread, and kefta all contribute a little
Eggs (whites + yolks) and kefta cover this well
Kefta dominant, rice and bread add a little more
Nuts (2g each) and kefta — modest contributions only
3 egg yolks + kefta land almost exactly on target
Fromage frais mild — consider swapping for raib for better gut value
Bread + kefta only sources today — comfortably within normal range
Carrot, courgette, kiwi, apple, peach, olive oil, nuts — the breakfast fruit broadened this from earlier
Eggs + kefta + rice + perly comfortably clear the target
Oat + rice + nuts push this well past target
Oat and rice are the only grain sources — lower than days with potato/banana
Egg yolks + kefta cover this comfortably
3 egg yolks provide the bulk of this
